name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Here's a gentle look at what came through the practice yesterday — a few new patients reaching out, some appointments on the books, and the usual rhythm of follow-ups. Nothing that needs you right this second.

I'll keep an eye on things and surface anything that needs a human touch. Have a warm one out there.

— Bright Smile Dental
